title: 以下、Kernel/FUGUEに活用できる？ Server: SimpleHTTP/0.6 Python/3.11.9
summary_text: Must-have governance controls for using `openai/skills` in Kernel/FUGUE: - `Scope control`: allow only repo-pinned skills (`.agents/skills`), block `USER/ADMIN/SYSTEM` skills in governed runs. - `Version immutability`: pin by commit SHA/content hash for `SKILL.md`, `agents/openai.yaml`, `scripts/**`, `references/**`; reject drift at runtime. - `Invocation policy`: set `allow_implicit_invocation: false` for high-risk skills; require explicit skill invocation in lane specs. - `Capability sandbox`: per-lane allowlists for filesystem/network/exec/tool access; default deny for mutating actions. - `Change governance`: CODEOWNERS + security review required for skill/policy/script changes; no direct merge for privileged skills. - `Execution evidence`: log lane ID, provider, skill name/path/hash, invocation mode, tool calls, outputs, and decision trace. - `Provider parity`: normalized output schema + replay/parity checks across `Codex + Claude + GLM` (or approved fallback quorum). - `Data governance`: redact/deny secrets/PII before skill execution; enforce outbound data policy and retention limits. - `Rollback readiness`: deterministic rollback for failed/misbehaving skill rollouts; canary-first enablement only. - `Policy gate`: hard-fail when baseline council or approved fallback quorum is missing. Single-lane fallback is a workflow violation. Stop conditions (immediate `BLOCKED` or auto-halt): - Baseline council missing (`Codex + Claude + GLM`) and no evidenced fallback quorum (`Codex + 2 non-Codex lanes`). - Unauthorized skill source/scope detected, or hash mismatch vs approved manifest. - Implicit invocation triggered for a high-risk lane. - Skill requests capability outside lane allowlist. - Replay/parity gate fails on critical workflow. - Secret/PII egress policy violation or unredacted sensitive payload detected. - Audit ledger incomplete for any privileged action. - Consecutive provider/runtime failures exceed threshold (e.g., 3 hard failures) without safe fallback. Missing tests to add before production: - Deterministic replay test per skill hash. - Scope/collision test for skill resolution precedence. - Implicit-invocation boundary test (high-risk must not auto-run). - Capability containment test (blocked FS/network/exec paths). - Cross-provider parity/schema conformance test. - Quorum policy gate test (`BLOCKED` on insufficient lanes).
